Appearance

Learn Vim & NeovimThe Complete Handbook (2026)

From absolute beginner to advanced user — 65 chapters covering everything you need to master Vim and Neovim.

📖 Start Learning
📋 Quick Cheat Sheet
🏋️ Practice Exercises

🏗️ Foundations

Modes, installation, first launch, file operations — build from the ground up.

🧭 Navigation

Master motions, word jumps, file jumps, and searching at the speed of thought.

✏️ Editing

Insert, delete, change, copy, paste, undo, replace — edit with surgical precision.

👁️ Visual Mode

Select text by character, line, or block — visual editing made powerful.

🔤 Text Objects

Operate on words, quotes, brackets, tags — Vim's composable grammar at its best.

⚡ Advanced Vim

Registers, macros, buffers, windows, tabs — unlock Vim's real power.

⚙️ Configuration

Customize Vim with vimrc, keymaps, plugins, and colorschemes.

🚀 Neovim IDE

Build a modern IDE with lazy.nvim, Treesitter, LSP, Telescope, and more.

💡 Daily Workflow

Editing, refactoring, navigation tricks, productivity tips, and the cheat sheet.

Start Your Vim Journey ​

Vim is not just a text editor — it's a language for editing text. This handbook teaches you that language, one chapter at a time.

Quick Start ​

  1. Chapter 1 — Introduction
  2. Chapter 5 — Installation
  3. Chapter 6 — Your First Launch
  4. Chapter 65 — Cheat Sheet

Practice ​

Put your skills to the test with our interactive practice exercises.
